summary: Tested Manual Customer Addition and Salon-Side Booking features. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI working after fixing syntax error in CustomerMaster.js. Both features fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in CustomerMaster.js - missing closing brace for handleCreatePackage function at line 278
Consider adding aria-describedby to Dialog components for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created test customers and bookings via API for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manual Customer Addition and Salon-Side Booking features are fully working. Backend endpoints POST /api/salons/{salon_id}/customers and POST /api/salons/{salon_id}/salon-booking are functional. Frontend modals for both features are working correctly.

1_manual_customer_addition_backend.details: Tested adding customer with all fields (name, phone, gender), name only (walk-in), Kids gender, missing name validation (400 error), and duplicate phone update behavior

2_salon_booking_backend.details: Tested creating booking with existing customer, ad-hoc customer (name only), multiple services, pay_later mode, auto-shift detection, and customer auto-save

3_add_customer_modal_ui.details: Customer Master page shows 'Add Customer' button. Modal opens with Customer Name (required), Mobile Number (optional), Gender selection (Men/Women/Kids), Add Customer and Cancel buttons

4_add_booking_modal_ui.details: Token Management Dashboard shows 'Add Booking' button near 'Call Next'. Modal has two modes: 'Select Existing Customer' (shows customer list) and 'Add New Customer' (name required, phone optional, gender selection). Includes barber selection, service selection with prices, and payment mode options (CASH/UPI/CARD/Pay Later At Salon)

bug_fixes_applied.issue: CustomerMaster.js had syntax error - missing closing brace for handleCreatePackage function
bug_fixes_applied.fix: Added missing '};' after the try-catch block at line 278
